goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'friday' and should 'leave after 12:30'.
The train should go to 'stevenage' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'price'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on friday and should leave after 12:30
The train should go to stevenage and should depart from cambridge
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
Make sure you get address and entrance fee
